# IP-007: Recursive chain — vulnerable
lang: go
file: IP-007-vulnerable.go
variant: taint
---
package sample

import (
    "net/http"
    "os"
)

func process(s string, depth int) {
    if depth > 5 { return }
    os.Open(s)
    process(s, depth + 1)
}

func caller() {
    process(r.URL.Query().Get("input"), 0)
}
